name: TemporaryCodes
title: Temporary SDC Codes
description: Defines codes defined within the SDC implementation guide that are expected to migrate elsewhere in future releases

concept.definition: Code indicating a request to complete the a questionnaire - e.g. by Task or ServiceRequest
A canonical reference (possibly version-specific) to the Questionnaire to be completed
A reference to the QuestionnaireResponse resulting from the requested action
Identifies the base URL for FHIR servers to which the Questionnaire resulting from the Task should be POSTed
Indicates that a Questionnaire is a library of reusable items to be referenced during modular form assembly.
